name: standards-conformance report sits alongside the compliance report in the same output directory by default
command: mkdir -p reports && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conformance-report.sh" --out-dir reports --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/compliance-report.sh" --out-dir reports --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && [ -f reports/STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md ] && [ -f reports/COMPLIANCE-REPORT.md ] && echo ok 1>&2
